purpose: Seed data for proactive personal-assistant daily briefings. Public-safe only; real state belongs in secure memory bank.
assistant_standard: Every user opens Libby to a proactive daily briefing: what changed, what is ready, what needs approval, what is blocked, and what to do next.

briefings.greeting: Good morning, Matthew. I checked your local dashboard.

calendar_summary.label: Calendar sync pending
calendar_summary.detail: Google Calendar is not connected yet. Local calendar anchors are available but not authoritative.

urgent_tasks: Draft and send the urgent letter today.
Confirm exact recipient and any dates before sending.
Keep private evidence out of public GitHub.
needs_approval: Any outgoing letter must be reviewed by Matthew before sending.
Any private evidence upload needs secure-memory-bank approval.
blocked_items: Real Apple/Google/passkey auth is not connected.
Secure backend memory bank is not connected.
Gmail/Drive/Calendar live sync is not connected.
Root index promotion is still pending if workflow has not run.

recommended_next_action.label: Draft urgent letter first
recommended_next_action.detail: Use Letter Mode, generate the message, copy it, and verify exact facts before sending.

briefings.greeting: Good morning, Kellsie. This is your private Libby workspace.

calendar_summary.label: Workspace setup pending
calendar_summary.detail: No private calendar is connected yet.

urgent_tasks: Choose what Libby should help organize first.
prepared_outputs: Shared household case can be added only with explicit permission.
needs_approval: No shared household data should appear unless Kellsie and Matthew both allow it.
blocked_items: Private memory bank is not connected.

recommended_next_action.label: Start onboarding
recommended_next_action.detail: Set communication preferences and choose the first thing Libby should help with.

briefings.greeting: Good morning, Nikki. Welcome to your Libby workspace. This is separate from Matthew’s workspace.

calendar_summary.label: Onboarding calendar not connected
calendar_summary.detail: Tell Libby about any important dates, appointments, deadlines, or reminders.

urgent_tasks: Choose the first thing you want help organizing.
Choose consent/privacy settings before private storage or sharing.
prepared_outputs: Local workspace can open after onboarding.
Libby can help draft the first task, letter, reminder, or support note.
needs_approval: Libby should not store or share private information until consent choices are selected.
Letters should be reviewed by Nikki before sending.
blocked_items: Secure backend memory is not connected yet.
Real Apple/Google/passkey login is not connected yet.
Background monitoring is not available until backend workers exist.

recommended_next_action.label: Tell Libby the first thing to organize
recommended_next_action.detail: Pick paperwork, appointments, benefits, housing, family communication, letters, or reminders.

briefings.greeting: Welcome to the Libby demo. No private user data is loaded.

calendar_summary.label: Demo calendar
calendar_summary.detail: Shows how Libby would prepare briefings before meetings.

prepared_outputs: Demo workflow is redacted and safe.
blocked_items: Private memory is intentionally unavailable in demo mode.

recommended_next_action.label: Open demo dashboard
recommended_next_action.detail: See how Libby turns scattered life information into briefings, tasks, letters, and handshakes.
